title: philotheca scabra
intro: Philotheca scabra, also known as the rough peppermint bush, is a shrub native to Australia, belonging to the Rutaceae family. It is valued for its leaves and essential oil, which have medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Philotheca scabra include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and improved respiratory health. The plant's leaves can be used to make herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, and are often used in traditional medicine and aromatherapy preparations.
